channel.title: Ringside Recliner
channel.description: Anonymous, casual pro wrestling commentary organised into show hubs and standalone posts.

item.title: The opening promo finally found the point
item.description: It wandered, doubled back, and nearly lost me — then one sharp line made the whole thing click. — Saturday Night Supershow

item.title: The midcard match stole the tape
item.description: No epic build. No giant promise. Just two wrestlers making every small decision feel important. — Saturday Night Supershow

item.title: One camera cut too many
item.description: The move was good. I assume. I saw the start, three audience members, and the aftermath. — Saturday Night Supershow

item.title: Fine. The finish worked on me.
item.description: I saw the trick coming, complained about it in advance, and still sat forward when it happened. — Saturday Night Supershow
